details: Call an LLM with an OpenAI-style chat API and store the result in workflow context.

agentOps.appDescription: Core workflow nodes, runtime primitives, and n8n-style built-in blocks available in the designer.

fields.label: Template
fields.placeholder: Summarize incident {{ trigger.payload.incident_id }} and propose next steps.
fields.helpText: Rendered as the user prompt sent to the model.

fields.label: API base URL
fields.helpText: Override the default endpoint when you need a different OpenAI-compatible API base URL.

fields.label: Secret name
fields.helpText: Resolve this secret from the workflow secret group before calling the model.

fields.label: Secret group
fields.helpText: Optional. Override the workflow secret group for this node with a scoped secret group ID.

fields.label: System prompt
fields.placeholder: You are an incident response assistant.

fields.label: Extra body JSON
fields.helpText: Optional provider-specific fields merged into the request body after prompts and model.
